title: Create a list
description: Allows the user to create a list of places they have saved. They can give the list a title and a description. For example, the list might be Columbus Ohio Restaurants or Things to do in Seattle or Favorite hikes aroudn the U.S. The idea is that users can take their saved places and organize them.

title: Public vs private listings
description: Within my account, I want individual places to be marked public or private. For me, I can see all. For other accounts, they can only see those I marked public. This attribute needs to be viewable by me for all listings when in the app. For starters, make all listings public.
